description: Rigid borescope cutaway in a straight gun-drilled passage: eyepiece w/ eyecup + knurled focus ring + light-guide post, stainless tube w/ illumination fiber sheath, 5 relay lens pairs, objective at distal tip. Passage outline draws first, scope appears, tip light cone hits a burr, relays light tip-to-eyepiece as image rays thread the glass, eyepiece glows w/ crisp magnified inset.
